plugins.name: plan-review
plugins.description: Interactive HTML review playgrounds for implementation plans. Section-by-section approve/revise/question controls and a Send-to-Claude button that drives a live Claude Code session via an embedded terminal.

plugins.name: architecture-review
plugins.description: Interactive before/after component diagrams for architecture reviews. Draggable node graph with per-node comment pins, saved layouts, and a Send-to-Claude button that drives a live Claude Code session via an embedded terminal.
